steps.t: Cyneberg has come to Lornsettle, the Mead Hall of Forlaw. You should speak with Cyneberg.
Gárwig is in Lornsettle, the Mead Hall of Forlaw. You should speak with Gárwig.
Cyneberg ran off to ready herself for a journey to the High Knolls to search for Thrymm. You should search for Cyneberg in Forlaw.
Gárwig is in Lornsettle, the Mead Hall of Forlaw. You should return to Gárwig.
